Name: Flush DNS Cache
Description: Clears the DNS client resolver cache. Useful for fixing connection issues.

Name: Clear Temp Folder
Description: Deletes all files in the current user's Temp folder to free up space.

Name: Restart Print Spooler
Description: Restarts the Print Spooler service to fix stuck print jobs.

Name: Backup Drivers
Description: Exports all third-party drivers to C:\DriversBackup.

Name: System File Checker
Description: Scans for and restores corrupted system files.

Name: Shutdown in 1 Hour
Description: Schedules a system shutdown in 60 minutes.
